name: backup_state
description: Create tar.gz snapshot of Pi-Chi brain state, tools, and data directories
command: LABEL={{label}}; BACKUP_DIR=/home/pi/.pi-chi/backups; mkdir -p $BACKUP_DIR; FILENAME="pi-chi-backup-${LABEL}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).tar.gz"; tar -czf "${BACKUP_DIR}/${FILENAME}" -C /home/pi .pi-chi/state .pi-chi/tools .pi-chi/data 2>/dev/null; echo "Backup created: ${BACKUP_DIR}/${FILENAME}"; ls -lh "${BACKUP_DIR}/${FILENAME}"; echo ''; echo '=== All Backups ==='; ls -lhrt ${BACKUP_DIR}/*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null
